{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# PDFWKRNL.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

AMD USB-C Power Delivery Firmware Update Kernel Library driver with arbitrary physical memory read/write capabilities. Identified in ESET EDR killers research (March 2026) as actively abused by threat actors to disable EDR products.
- **UUID**: ed27c0b8-6177-4132-a7af-5c15bcb386f3
- **Created**: 2026-03-20
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**: ESET Research | [@ESETresearch](https://twitter.com/@ESETresearch)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/b96d75a000367c200958089728fc5cb8.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "PDFWKRNL.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create PDFWKRNL.sys binPath=C:\windows\temp\PDFWKRNL.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start PDFWKRNL.sys
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |



### Detections


{{< block "grid-3" >}}
{{< column >}}
#### YARA 🏹
{{< details "Expand" >}}

{{< details "Expand" >}}

{{< /details >}}
#### Imported Functions
{{< details "Expand" >}}
* MmBuildMdlForNonPagedPool
* IoAllocateMdl
* RtlInitUnicodeString
* MmMapIoSpace
* MmFreeContiguousMemory
* IoDeleteDevice
* MmUnmapIoSpace
* MmGetPhysicalAddress
* IoDeleteSymbolicLink
* IoFreeMdl
* MmAllocateContiguousMemorySpecifyCache
* IoCreateDevice
* ExFreePoolWithTag
* MmUnmapLockedPages
* IofCompleteRequest
* IoCreateSymbolicLink
* MmMapLockedPages
